properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When life is overwhelming And fear is all I feel Your word that lives inside me Reminds me You are here

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My hope You restore Your promise is sure And I am convinced That You are faithful!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All things are possible In Your name All things are possible In Your name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The stars they hold Your promise You guide me through the night! My heart is set to worship My great reward is Christ

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All things are possible In Your name (Your name, Jesus) All things are possible In Your name (oh, Your holy name) All things are possible In Your name (in Your name) All things are possible In Your name! …

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All shadows are lost, Your light's breaking through Shaken no more, I see only You All shadows are lost, Your light's breaking through Shaken no more, I see only You All shadows are lost, Your light's breaking through Shaken no more, I see only You! I see only You! …

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: All things are possible In Your name All things are possible In Your name! (in Your name!) All things are possible In Your name (it is Your name, Jesus) All things are possible In Your name!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We believe in Your power, Jesus We believe in Your name All things are possible
